stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
When flying from A to B, in which area would you anticipate clear ice accretion?

options.a: East of the warm front above the 0°C isotherm.
options.b: West of the warm front above the 0°C isotherm.
options.c: West of the warm front below the 0°C isotherm.
options.d: No icing accretion should be anticipated associated with a warm front.
